steps: Delete candidates.db; run `streamlit run app.py --server.headless true` with no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set; curl localhost
expected: App serves HTTP 200 with no manual setup step besides API key / pip install
actual: HTTP 200 on first request both times tested; init_db() created table automatically

steps: Kill server; boot again from scratch a second time
expected: Same clean boot as first time
actual: Identical clean boot; no leftover-file or stale-process issues

steps: Run 1: open app, select '+ Add new candidate', type name + notes, click Summarize (no key), seed a candidate directly, reload app, switch to that candidate. Repeat as Run 2.
expected: No exceptions; candidate list grows correctly; notes/summary reload correctly on both runs
actual: No exceptions either run; options list correctly showed both prior and newly seeded candidates on reload; notes and summary loaded correctly when switching

steps: Select '+ Add new candidate', leave name blank, type notes, click Summarize
expected: Clean subheader '(unnamed — type a name in the sidebar)'; no crash
actual: Subheader rendered exactly as expected; no exception

steps: Enter a candidate name, leave notes blank, click Summarize
expected: st.warning 'Paste some interview notes first.'; no API call attempted; no crash
actual: Warning shown exactly as expected; no exception

steps: Enter name + notes, do NOT click Summarize, look for a Save button
expected: Save button should not be rendered/clickable since no summary_result exists yet
actual: Confirmed 0 Save buttons present in the button list before Summarize is ever clicked

steps: Start '+ Add new candidate', type a name and partial notes, then switch the sidebar selectbox to an existing saved candidate before saving
expected: No crash; either input preserved or clearly/silently reset (informational)
actual: No crash. In-progress unsaved text is silently discarded on switch (by design of session_state reset keyed on candidate). Logged as a known UX sharp edge

steps: With ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset and no secrets.toml file anywhere on disk, enter name + notes, click Summarize
expected: A single clean on-screen st.error message; no raw traceback
actual: BEFORE FIX: two stacked error messages appeared — Streamlit's internal 'No secrets found. Valid paths for a secrets.toml file...' (exposing local file paths) followed by the app's intended clean message. AFTER FIX: only the single intended clean error message appears.

steps: Inject a mock summary result (isolating from the real API), click Save, reload the app in a fresh session, reselect the same candidate
expected: Saved data persists to SQLite; reload shows same notes + summary; no crash
actual: Confirmed: options list included the new candidate after reload; notes and summary rendered identically after reload; no exceptions

test_type: Server/UI log scan for raw tracebacks
steps: Reviewed streamlit server log output across all runs above
expected: No unhandled Python tracebacks or raw exception dumps in server log or UI
actual: Only a benign NotOpenSSLWarning (LibreSSL vs OpenSSL) in the terminal log; never surfaced in the app UI; no tracebacks anywhere
